pageContext.name: Klaus Hargreeves
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Mighty Jaxx present the Klaus Hargreeves Vinyl Collectible.  The charismatic cult-leader of the Hargreeves family, Klaus, is captured in YARMS Studios' signature style with clean lines and minimalist aesthetics.  On his palms, the words hello and goodbye are tattooed.  The Umbrella Academy: Klaus Hargreeves by YARMS immortalizes the spiritual figurehead of Destiny's Children, shower him with your adulation.
